Package neqsim.process.chemistry

Class ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor extends Object implements Serializable
Evaluates compatibility of a set of production chemicals with each other and with the produced fluid / equipment material.

The assessor combines two information sources:

  1. A rule base loaded by ChemicalInteractionRule.loadDefaultRules() (CSV-driven).
  2. Operating conditions and water chemistry supplied by the caller (temperature, pressure, Ca/Fe/HCO3 concentrations, material).

The output is a structured report with:

  • An overall verdict: COMPATIBLE / CAUTION / INCOMPATIBLE.
  • A pairwise interaction matrix.
  • An ordered list of identified issues with mechanism and mitigation.
  • Temperature stability flags.
  • A JSON-serialisable map for downstream tools.

Pattern: configure with setters, call evaluate(), then read the getters or toJson().

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor

      public ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor()
      Default constructor.

  • Method Details

    • fromStream

      public static ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor fromStream(StreamInterface stream)
      Convenience factory: builds an assessor and seeds operating conditions and aqueous-phase concentrations from any NeqSim StreamInterface via StreamChemistryAdapter.
      Parameters:
      stream - produced fluid stream
      Returns:
      assessor pre-loaded with T, P, Ca, Fe, HCO3

    • addChemical

      public void addChemical(ProductionChemical chemical)
      Adds a chemical to the study.
      Parameters:
      chemical - chemical to add

    • clearChemicals

      public void clearChemicals()
      Removes all chemicals from the study.

    • setRules

      public void setRules(List<ChemicalInteractionRule> rules)
      Replaces the rule base. Use to load custom rule sets, e.g. from a vendor library.
      Parameters:
      rules - rule base

    • setTemperatureCelsius

      public void setTemperatureCelsius(double temperatureC)
      Sets the operating temperature.
      Parameters:
      temperatureC - temperature in Celsius

    • setPressureBara

      public void setPressureBara(double pressureBara)
      Sets the operating pressure.
      Parameters:
      pressureBara - pressure in bara

    • setCalciumMgL

      public void setCalciumMgL(double mgL)
      Sets the calcium concentration of produced water.
      Parameters:
      mgL - calcium in mg/L

    • setIronMgL

      public void setIronMgL(double mgL)
      Sets the iron concentration of produced water.
      Parameters:
      mgL - iron in mg/L

    • setBicarbonateMgL

      public void setBicarbonateMgL(double mgL)
      Sets the bicarbonate concentration of produced water.
      Parameters:
      mgL - bicarbonate in mg/L

    • setMaterial

      public void setMaterial(String material)
      Sets the equipment material.
      Parameters:
      material - material identifier (free text)

    • evaluate

      public void evaluate()
      Runs the evaluation. Populates the issues list, pairwise matrix, thermal stability flags and the overall verdict.

    • addIssue

      private void addIssue(ProductionChemical a, ProductionChemical b, String category, String mechanism, String mitigation, ChemicalInteractionRule.Severity severity)
      Records an issue and bumps the highest severity.
      Parameters:
      a - primary chemical
      b - secondary chemical (may be null)
      category - short category label
      mechanism - mechanism description
      mitigation - recommended mitigation
      severity - severity classification

    • updateMatrix

      private void updateMatrix(String a, String b, String label)
      Updates a cell in the symmetric pairwise matrix, keeping the worst severity seen.
      Parameters:
      a - row key
      b - column key
      label - severity label

    • setMatrixCell

      private void setMatrixCell(String a, String b, String label)
      Sets a single matrix cell, keeping the worst severity seen.
      Parameters:
      a - row key
      b - column key
      label - new severity label

    • isWorse

      private static boolean isWorse(String newLabel, String currentLabel)
      Returns true if newLabel is worse than currentLabel on the severity scale.
      Parameters:
      newLabel - new severity label
      currentLabel - current severity label
      Returns:
      true if newLabel is worse

    • rank

      private static int rank(String label)
      Returns ordinal rank for a severity label (lower ordinal = worse).
      Parameters:
      label - severity label
      Returns:
      integer rank (HIGH=0, MEDIUM=1, LOW=2, INFO=3, OK=4)

    • getVerdict

      public ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor.Verdict getVerdict()
      Returns the overall verdict.
      Returns:
      verdict (COMPATIBLE / CAUTION / INCOMPATIBLE)

    • getHighestSeverity

      public ChemicalInteractionRule.Severity getHighestSeverity()
      Returns the highest severity observed.
      Returns:
      highest severity

    • getIssues

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getIssues()
      Returns the issue list.
      Returns:
      list of issues

    • getInteractionMatrix

      public Map<String,Map<String,String>> getInteractionMatrix()
      Returns the pairwise interaction matrix.
      Returns:
      matrix (chemical1 → chemical2 → severity label)

    • getThermalStability

      public Map<String,Boolean> getThermalStability()
      Returns the temperature stability flags.
      Returns:
      map of chemical name to stability flag

    • isEvaluated

      public boolean isEvaluated()
      Returns whether evaluate() has been run.
      Returns:
      true if evaluated

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Returns the structured result map (for JSON serialisation).
      Returns:
      ordered map of result fields

    • getStandardsApplied

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getStandardsApplied()
      Returns the industry standards applied by the compatibility assessor.
      Returns:
      list of standards (each as an ordered map)

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Returns the result as a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON string
